Finish your tasks.

BloomDay turns every completed task into a living plant. Build habits, stay focused, and watch your garden flourish — one task at a time.

How It Works

Three steps to a greener day

Simple enough for anyone. Rewarding enough to keep you coming back.

Step 01

Add Your Tasks

Write down what you need to do today. Set priorities, deadlines, and recurring habits.

Step 02

Complete Them

Check off tasks as you go. Use Focus Mode to stay in the zone with a built-in timer.

Step 03

Watch It Grow

Every task waters your garden. See new plants sprout, bloom, and fill your personal landscape.

Features

Everything you need to bloom

A productivity app that rewards you with beauty.

Indoor Garden

Your cozy interior garden

Start with a sunlit windowsill filled with potted plants. Complete tasks to unlock new species and watch your indoor sanctuary grow.

Potted Plants Sunlit Scene Cozy Vibes
Outdoor Garden

A sprawling outdoor space

Unlock the outdoor garden to grow flowers, shrubs, and trees in a beautiful open landscape. The more you accomplish, the more lush it becomes.

Trees & Flowers Growth Diary Reminders
Allotment

Your personal allotment

Grow vegetables, herbs, and crops in your own patch. This charming garden theme rewards consistency with a bountiful harvest.

Vegetables Streak Tracker Harvest Joy
Time Capsule

Letters to your future self

Write messages, set a date, and let BloomDay deliver them when the time comes. Reflect on how far you've grown.

Schedule Delivery Personal Notes Growth Reflection
130+ Species

A plant for every achievement

From common ferns to rare orchids. The more consistent you are, the rarer the plants you unlock.
